name: PhishCatch: Local Email Phishing Detector
description: Instant, on-device email phishing detection. No AI, no cloud, no per-email cost. Automatically monitors your Gmail inbox in the background and flags dangerous emails, no clicking required.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src https://gmail.googleapis.com https://www.googleapis.com https://accounts.google.com; object-src 'none'
